name: V4 Workspace Demo - Semiconductor Export Controls
description: Release-validation demo for Project -> Questions -> Evidence Library -> Analysis Runs -> Decision Timeline -> Decision Delta.

questions.question: Should management pause high-risk semiconductor customer orders while export-control exposure is reviewed?
After receiving clearer licensing guidance, should management resume lower-risk shipments while maintaining restrictions for unresolved customers?

evidence_library.title: Initial export-control policy bulletin
evidence_library.text_excerpt: New controls affect advanced semiconductor equipment, AI chips, design software, and restricted end users.
evidence_library.summary: Initial local evidence note establishing the decision problem and immediate compliance uncertainty.
evidence_library.freshness_note: Demo evidence representing the first project question.

evidence_library.title: Follow-up licensing clarification
evidence_library.text_excerpt: Clarification identifies narrower restrictions, a licensing path, and a transition period for some previously authorized orders.
evidence_library.summary: Follow-up local evidence note used to demonstrate how project decisions can change or stabilize over time.
evidence_library.freshness_note: Demo evidence representing the second project question.

decision_history.recommendation_summary: Option B: map exposure, preserve flexibility, and prepare staged response options.
Option B: map exposure, preserve flexibility, and prepare staged response options.
